mapper.select: SELECT ADMIN_NUMBER, ADMIN_ID, ADMIN_PW, ADMIN_NAME, ADD_DATE FROM TBL_ADMIN WHERE ADMIN_ID = #{adminId} AND ADMIN_PW = #{adminPw}
SELECT COUNT(USER_NUMBER) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_TYPE = '기업회원'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT USER_NUMBER, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_JOIN_DATE FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_TYPE = '일반회원' ORDER BY USER_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(USER_NUMBER) FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_TYPE = '일반회원'
SELECT USER_NUMBER, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_JOIN_DATE FROM TBL_USER WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} AND USER_TYPE = '일반회원'
SELECT USER_NUMBER, MEMBER_DOB, MEMBER_GENDER, JOB_NUMBER FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT U.USER_NUMBER, U.USER_ID, C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, U.USER_JOIN_DATE, C.COMPANY_STATE FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM ON U.USER_NUMBER = CM.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON CM.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE U.USER_TYPE = '기업회원' ORDER BY U.USER_NUMBER DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}
SELECT COUNT(U.USER_NUMBER) FROM TBL_USER U JOIN TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM ON U.USER_NUMBER = CM.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON CM.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE U.USER_TYPE = '기업회원'

SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS, C.COMPANY_STATE, C.COMPANY_BRN, F.FILE_PATH, CI.COMP_CEO_NAME, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT, CI.COMP_REV, CI.COMP_CAP, CI.COMP_TYPE, CI.COMP_SUMMARY, CI.COMP_TECH, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ, CI.COMP_INFO, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST, JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD, JP.JOB_POST_DATE, JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING FROM TBL_COMPANY C LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = F.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}
